settings.title: Settings
settings.makeAppWork: Make {appName} work the way you want it to.
settings.languageInfo: Choose the language for the user interface.
settings.defaultZapInfo: The default amount of sats to use when sending a lightning tip.
settings.platformZapInfo: How much you'd like to tip the developer of {appName} whenever you send a zap.
settings.sendDelayInfo: A delay period allowing you to cancel a reply or note creation, in seconds.
settings.proofOfWorkInfo: Add a proof-of-work stamp to your notes to increase your reach.
settings.maxRelaysInfo: This controls how many relays to max out at when loading feeds and event context. More is faster, but will require more bandwidth and processing power.
settings.authenticateRelaysInfo: Allows {appName} to authenticate with relays that have access controls automatically.
settings.blossomInfo: Enter one or more urls for blossom compatible nostr media servers.
settings.dufflepudInfo: Enter a custom url for {appName}'s helper application. Dufflepud is used for hosting images and loading link previews.
settings.imgproxyInfo: Enter a custom imgproxy url for resizing images on the fly to reduce bandwidth and improve privacy.
settings.reportAnalyticsInfo: Keep this enabled if you would like developers to be able to know what features are used, and to diagnose and fix bugs.
settings.clientFingerprintingInfo: If this is turned on, public notes you create will have a "client" tag added. This helps with troubleshooting, and allows other people to find out about {appName}.

login.title: Log In
login.ownsIdentity: , which allows you to own your social identity.
login.bunkerDescription: To log in using a remote signer, scan the QR code below or enter a connection link.
login.bunkerTooltip: Click to copy the connection string to your signer app
login.invalidPublicKey: Sorry, but that's an invalid public key.
login.noRelays: That connection string doesn't have any relays.
login.connectSearching: We're searching for your profile on the network.
login.connectFailed: We're having a hard time finding your profile.
login.skipWarning: , but be aware that your profile and relays may not get properly synchronized.
login.selectRelaysHint: If you'd like to select your relays manually instead, click
login.customRelayDescription: If you know which relay your profile is on, you can enter it below.
login.invalidRelayUrl: Please enter a valid relay url

onboarding.getAcquainted: Take a moment to get acquainted with {appName} — or skip straight to account setup.
onboarding.learnProtocol: Learn about the protocol at your own pace by watching one of our tutorial videos.
onboarding.readyClick: When you're ready, click below and we'll guide you through the process of creating an account.
onboarding.nstartDescription: To get you started, we'll redirect you to an app called nstart, which will guide you through the process of creating and securely storing your account keys.
onboarding.nstartHelp: Nstart will also help you fill out your social profile, then when you're done you'll be sent back here to finish setting up your account.
onboarding.pickCategory: Pick a category to find some people to follow, or click
onboarding.peopleYouFollowDescription: These are the people you'll be following once you finish creating your account.
onboarding.relaysDescription: Relays are where content on nostr lives. Connecting to different relays can result in a different experience.
onboarding.askNostr: If you have any questions, just use the #asknostr hashtag — people are always happy to lend a hand.
onboarding.introduceYourself: Now is a great time to introduce yourself to the Nostr network!
onboarding.calculatingPow: Hang on tight, we're calculating proof of work...

actions.powCost: This event cost {pow} bits of work

channel.notConfiguredDescription: In order to deliver messages, Coracle needs to know where to send them. Please visit your
channel.setUpRelays: and set up your messaging relays.
channel.noMessagingRelays: does not have messaging relays, which means they may not be able to receive DMs.
channel.noMessagingRelaysPlural: do not have messaging relays, which means they may not be able to receive DMs.
channel.yourNoRelays: You don't have any messaging relays set up yet, which will make it difficult for you to receive replies to this conversation. Click
channel.yourNoRelaysEnd: to set up your messaging relays.

relayList.title: Relays
relayList.relaysDescription: Relays are hubs for your content and connections. At least one is required to interact with the network, but you can join as many as you like.
relayList.otherRelaysDescription: Below are relays used by people in your network. Adding these may improve your ability to load profiles and content.
relayList.searchPlaceholder: Search relays or add a custom url
relayList.addRelayDescription: Enter a relay url below to add it to your relay selections.

about.title: About
about.subtitle: A Nostr client for feeds that puts relays first.
about.supportDevDescription: All funds will be used to support server costs and development.

userData.title: Data
userData.heading: App Database
userData.description: View, import, and export your local database.
userData.exportDescription: Click below to download a backup of all {count} events in your database.
userData.importDescription: Upload a nostr export file to pull events into your database.
userData.author: Author

walletConnect.description: Use Nostr Wallet Connect to send Bitcoin payments over Lightning.
walletConnect.connectionSecretInfo: You can find this in any wallet that supports
walletConnect.extensionNoSupport: Your extension does not support lightning payments

walletDisconnect.title: Disconnect Wallet
walletDisconnect.confirm: Are you sure you want to disconnect your bitcoin wallet?

zap.title: Send a Zap
zap.zapSplits: This note has zap splits enabled. You'll be zapping {count} people:

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.noNotifications: No notifications found - check back later!

feedList.noFeeds: You don't have any feeds yet.
feedList.otherFeedsDescription: Below are feeds created by people in your network.

listList.noLists: You don't have any lists yet.
listList.otherListsDescription: Below are lists created by people in your network.

listSelect.selectListDescription: Select a list to add your selection to.
listSelect.noLists: You don't have any lists yet.

feeds.clickHere: Click {link} to join the nostr network.

dataExport.selectEvents: Select which events you'd like to export
dataExport.onlyYourEventsInfo: If enabled, only your events will be exported.
dataExport.errorSaving: Error saving file. Please try again.
dataExport.fileSaved: File saved to your documents folder as {filename}

dataImport.populateDatabase: Populate {appName}'s database with a nostr export file
dataImport.jsonlInfo: Nostr exports are .jsonl files. Some software may compress exports, be sure to upload an uncompressed version.
dataImport.selectFile: Please select a file to import.

labelCreate.addNote: Add this note to your collections. You can find your collections on your profile page.
labelCreate.searchTopics: Search for existing topics, or create your own.
labelCreate.selectCollection: Please select at least one collection.

reportCreate.whyReporting: Why are you reporting this content?
reportCreate.reportsSentTo: Reports are sent to {person} for review. No identifying information is included with the report.

help.wotDescription1: WoT (Web Of Trust) is one of the best ways to determine how trustworthy someone might be, based on your social graph.
help.wotDescription2: In {appName}, this number is equal to how many people you follow that also follow a given person, minus how many people you follow who have muted this person. This allows you to see at a glance if someone is accepted in your network. This helps reduce spam, impostors, and objectionable content.
help.wotDescription3: You can set a minimum web of trust score on your content settings page, which will automatically mute anyone with a lower score than your threshold.
help.signerDescription1: Nostr uses cryptographic key pairs instead of passwords to authenticate users. This means that you and nobody else controls your social identity - however it also requires some care to avoid losing your keys, or having them stolen.
help.signerDescription2: Instead of pasting your private key (also known as an "nsec") into every nostr app you use, it's wise to choose a single signer application to keep them for you.
help.signerDescription3: Some signers live on the internet, others can be installed on your phone or computer. If you're new to nostr, we recommend getting started with
help.dmDescription1: improves upon the old NIP 04 direct messages standard by adding support for group chats and better metadata hiding.
help.dmDescription2: In the past, a significant amount of information about private messages was public, even though the content of the messages was encrypted. This meant that anyone could find out who you were sending messages to, and how frequently.
help.dmDescription3: The new messaging standard dramatically reduces the amount of information messages leak, and is built on a more robust encryption standard.
help.notFound: Sorry, we couldn't find any information on "{topic}".

bech32.notFound: Sorry, we weren't able to find "{entity}".

chatEnable.enableQuestion: Do you want to enable notes and direct messages?
chatEnable.disabledByDefault: By default, notes and direct messages are disabled, since loading them requires {appName} to download and decrypt a lot of data.

channelCreate.title: Start a conversation
channelCreate.whoToTalkTo: Who do you want to talk to?
channelCreate.groupChatWarning: You are using a login method that doesn't yet support group chats. Please consider upgrading your signer to access this feature.
channelCreate.missingRelaysWarning: messaging relays, which means they likely either don't want to receive DMs, or are using a client that does not support nostr group chats.

noteCreate.title: Create a Note
noteCreate.whatToSay: What do you want to say?

noteDelete.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this event?
noteDelete.deleteWarning: This will send a request to the network to delete this event. Be aware that relays may not honor this request.

inviteCreate.title: Create an Invite
inviteCreate.description: Invite links allow you to help your friends onboard to nostr more easily, or get easy access to relays.
inviteCreate.suggestPeople: Suggest people to follow - this is especially useful for new users.
inviteCreate.inviteRelaysDescription: Invite people to use specific relays. An invite code can optionally be provided to grant access to private relays.

inviteAccept.title: You've been invited
inviteAccept.description: You've been sent a nostr invite link! Take a look below to find some suggestions to improve your experience on nostr.
inviteAccept.peopleDescription: Here are some people you might be interested in following.
inviteAccept.relaysDescription: Below are a few relays that might help you connect to the people you want to reach.

content.title: Content Preferences
content.heading: Content Settings
content.description: Control who and what you see on {appName}.
content.noteActionsInfo: Controls which icons appear at the bottom of any given note. Disabling these can reduce how much data {appName} uses.
content.showMediaInfo: If enabled, {appName} will automatically show images and previews for embedded links.
content.hideSensitiveInfo: If enabled, content flagged by the author as potentially sensitive will be hidden.
content.minWotScoreInfo: Select a minimum web-of-trust score. Notes from accounts with a lower score will be automatically hidden.
content.minPowInfo: Select a minimum proof-of-work difficulty for notes from people outside your network. If a note fails to meet both your minimum web of trust score and minimum proof-of-work difficulty, it will be hidden.
content.publiclyMutedAccountsInfo: Notes from these people will be hidden by default. This information may be used to identify impersonators and spammers.
content.privatelyMutedAccountsInfo: Notes from these people will be hidden by default. This information will be encrypted.
content.publiclyMutedWordsInfo: Notes containing these words will be hidden by default. This information may be used to identify impersonators and spammers.
content.privatelyMutedWordsInfo: Notes containing these words will be hidden by default. This information will be encrypted.
content.publiclyMutedTopicsInfo: Notes tagging these topics will be hidden by default. This information may be used to identify impersonators and spammers.
content.privatelyMutedTopicsInfo: Notes tagging these topics will be hidden by default. This information will be encrypted.

keys.title: Keys
keys.heading: Your keys
keys.description: Your account is identified across the network using a public/private keypair. This allows you to fully own your account, and move to another app if needed.
keys.publicKeyInfo: Your public key identifies your account. You can share this with people trying to find you on nostr.
keys.privateKeyInfo: Your private key is used to prove your identity by cryptographically signing messages. Do not share this with anyone. Be careful about copying this into other apps - instead, consider using a compatible browser extension to securely store your key.
keys.bunkerUrlInfo: Your bunker url works like password, and can be used instead of your private key to log in to other apps. This is safer than sharing your private key, but you should still be careful to keep your bunker url private.

profile.title: Profile
profile.heading: About You
profile.description: Give people a friendly way to recognize you. We recommend you do not use your real name or share your personal information. The future of the internet is pseudonymous.
profile.usernameInfo: In most clients, this image will be shown on your profile page.
profile.nip05Info: Enter a NIP-05 address to verify your public key.
profile.lightningAddressInfo: Enter a lightning address to enable sending and receiving bitcoin tips.
profile.websiteInfo: Enter any url where people can find out more about you.
profile.aboutYouInfo: Tell the world about yourself. This will be shown on your profile page.
profile.profilePictureInfo: Please be mindful of others and only use small images.

zen.noWalletDescription: This user has not set up their MULTIPASS or ZEN Card. They cannot receive ZEN from likes.
zen.usageDesc: Service credits: likes, relay usage, AI
zen.propertyDesc: Cooperative shares (3x1/3 distributed) - Renewal via G1society
zen.duniterV2sDesc: Ğ1 balance on Duniter v2s (Substrate blockchain)
